title: PHQ Garden Flowers
description: Hypixel Skyblock custom Moonflower textures. Presented by PacksHQ!
body:
Hypixel Skyblock moonflower/sunflower updated textures. Includes dynamic textures off of time, along with switching the melon stems to a different stem model, also includes item textures for the moonflower/enchanted moonflower items.

1.21.8+ **requires Catharsis** to function, without Catharsis not a single texture will be shown.
